article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry names and the release of a comprehensive sample pack.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry names. His production style is characterized by a fusion of electronic dance music elements with dancehall rhythms, establishing him as a notable figure in the Latin electronic scene.
He has collaborated with several well-known artists, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer. These collaborations have contributed to his growing reputation in the music industry.

Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used in various of his works, offering producers insight into his production techniques.
His work is often associated with artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, reflecting a broader network of influence within the electronic music community.
